channel.title: ForgeCore AI Productivity Brief
channel.description: Practical AI workflows, tools, and ROI cases for operators

item.title: Build a 3-Step AI Follow-Up System That Saves 5 Hours a Week
item.description: A solo consultant does not lose deals because they lack ideas. They lose deals because follow-up gets buried under client work, inbox noise, and half-finished notes. This issue gives you a simple AI-assisted follow-up system you can buil...

item.title: How Solo Operators Can Leverage Ollama's New Features to Streamline Workflows
item.description: Solo operators can automate coding tasks and enhance productivity with Ollama's latest features, saving hours each week by simplifying setup and improving performance. Ollama has introduced significant updates that can dramatically strea...
